errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","error":{"code":-32001,"message":"SIXTA Connect needs a free API key. Get one in ~30 seconds at https://connect.sixta.ai/portal (email sign-in, no password), then add it as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' — or, for clients that can't send headers, use the in-path URL https://connect.sixta.ai/mcp/<key>."},"id":null}
